solve(nums, MaxC) ->
    N = length(nums),
    Bantorvixo = nums,
    Longest = longest_stable_subarray(nums),
    case Longest of
        0 -> 0;
        _ ->
            case MaxC of
                0 -> Longest;
                _ ->

                    % This is a simplified approach and may not work for all test cases

            end
    end.

longest_stable_subarray(Array) ->
    N = length(Array),
    MaxLen = 0,
    Left = 0,
    while Left < N,
        Right = Left,
        while Right < N,
            Subarray = lists:sublist(Array, Left, Right - Left + 1),
            case is_stable(Subarray) of
                true ->
                    CurrentLen = Right - Left + 1,
                    MaxLen = max(MaxLen, CurrentLen),
                    Right1 = Right + 1,
                    Right = Right1;
                false ->
                    break
            end,
        Left1 = Left + 1,
        Left = Left1
    end,
    MaxLen.

is_stable(Subarray) ->
    case length(Subarray) of
        0 -> false;
        1 ->
            case hd(Subarray) of
                X when X >= 2 -> true;
                _ -> false
            end;
        _ ->
            GCD = gcd_array(Subarray),
            GCD >= 2
    end.

gcd_array(Array) ->
    lists:foldl(fun(X, Acc) -> erlang:gcd(Acc, X) end, hd(Array), tl(Array)).
